description: Beyond the walled cities, where the Concordant Web actually does its work — peer-to-peer mesh routing, walker journeys, federation handshakes. Settlements are small, sparse, and connected by a network of human-scale anchors. The Frontier is a player's first contact with the cnet-federation substrate; quests here require you to deliver something across a mesh you cannot see, only trust.

anchors.name: Link Post Alpha
anchors.description: The first authorized peer in the Frontier. Two human couriers + one walker NPC. The mesh starts here.

anchors.name: The Brokers' Camp
anchors.description: An itinerant settlement that drifts every season. Hosts travelling Federation envoys.

anchors.name: The Mesh Gate
anchors.description: A monument shaped from the stripped antennas of the first federation handshake. Players who arrive here for the first time get a +0.05 ecosystem_score boost (one-time).

lore_anchor_to_concordia: The Frontier is the only place where Concord-Link walker journeys can be physically witnessed. Every walker that connects two cities passes through here.
